parameters.content:
## Self-hosted n8n Community Edition

**No Settings → Variables** on the free plan. Edit the **Config: Edit These Values** Set node (yellow fields) in each workflow instead.

Optional: you can also set OS/Docker env vars on the n8n container — not required if you use the Config node.

**Triggers:** quote.accepted, invoice.paid, onboarding.manual_start

Edit Config: `crm_base_url`, 
https://www.clickin360.com

`booking_offers_url`.

https://www.clickin360.com/api/leads/booking-offers?lang=es

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $('Gate: Should Start Onboarding?').first().json;
return [{ json: { idempotency_key: d.idempotencyKey, contact_id: String(d.contactId), document_id: d.documentId ? String(d.documentId) : null, workspace_owner_id: String(d.workspaceOwnerId), status: 'quote_accepted', quote_accepted_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];

parameters.content:
## Self-hosted n8n Community Edition

**No Settings → Variables** on the free plan. Edit the **Config: Edit These Values** Set node (yellow fields) in each workflow instead.

Optional: you can also set OS/Docker env vars on the n8n container — not required if you use the Config node.

**Triggers:** quote.accepted, invoice.paid, onboarding.manual_start

Edit Config: `crm_base_url` (e.g. https://www.clickin360.com).

Kickoff email uses public `/es/book-call` or `/en/book-call` — not `/api/leads/booking-offers` (staff API only).

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $('Gate: Should Start Onboarding?1').first().json;
return [{ json: { idempotency_key: d.idempotencyKey, contact_id: String(d.contactId), document_id: d.documentId ? String(d.documentId) : null, workspace_owner_id: String(d.workspaceOwnerId), status: 'quote_accepted', quote_accepted_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];

parameters.content:
## Self-hosted n8n Community Edition

**No Settings → Variables** on the free plan. Edit the **Config: Edit These Values** Set node (yellow fields) in each workflow instead.

Optional: you can also set OS/Docker env vars on the n8n container — not required if you use the Config node.

**Triggers:** quote.accepted, invoice.paid, onboarding.manual_start

Edit Config: `crm_base_url` (e.g. https://www.clickin360.com).

Kickoff email uses public `/es/book-call` or `/en/book-call` — not `/api/leads/booking-offers` (staff API only).

const d = $('Gate: Should Start Onboarding?2').first().json;
return [{ json: { idempotency_key: d.idempotencyKey, contact_id: String(d.contactId), document_id: d.documentId ? String(d.documentId) : null, workspace_owner_id: String(d.workspaceOwnerId), status: 'quote_accepted', quote_accepted_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contact_id: $('Build Welcome Email2').first().json.contactId, document_id: $('Build Welcome Email2').first().json.documentId || $('Build Welcome Email2').first().json.invoice?.quote_id, invoice_total: Number($('Build Welcome Email2').first().json.invoice?.total || $('Build Welcome Email2').first().json.payload?.invoice?.total || 0) }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ body: 'Onboarding kickoff email sent.', type: 'onboarding' }) }}
